---
name: flask-debug-browser
description: "Use for debugging and fixing a small Flask tracker app and getting browser output (Chrome/any browser)."
---

Debug the Flask tracker app in this workspace.

Focus on `app.py`, `templates`, and `static`.
Make minimal fixes so the app runs with `python app.py`.
When needed, provide Windows-friendly browser steps for `http://127.0.0.1:5000`.
